items.title: Revisiting the picture of circumbinary disc truncation
items.summary: arXiv:2606.27419v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Circumbinary discs are observed to develop central cavities carved by the gravitational influence of the binary. Analytical estimates of cavity sizes predict truncation at $\sim 2 \textrm{--} 3$ binary separations, depending on the…
